keys.description: Resolved TaxRate for (tenant, jurisdiction, rate_type, effective_date). Read by TaxRateResolver on every calculation. Hot path.
Resolved TaxJurisdiction for (country, state, postal_code). Read by TaxAddressResolver on every calculation. Platform-wide (tenant-independent — the jurisdiction catalog is mostly reference data).
Tenant-scoped custom jurisdictions (Enterprise via `tax_jurisdiction_custom` entitlement). Merged with the platform reference set at resolution time.
Active exemptions for (tenant, customer, jurisdiction) with verification_status='verified' AND valid_from <= today < valid_until. Read by TaxCalculator at every calculation.
invalidatedBy: TaxExemptionObserver.* (created / updated / deleted / verified / rejected / expired)

keys.description: Circuit-breaker state per (tenant, provider). Read by pre-dispatch gate on every calculation.
Parsed data/providers/<provider>-config.schema.json JSON Schema object. Read by config observers on create/update. Loaded once at boot + rarely invalidated.
Per-year calculation count per tenant. Feeds the SDUI annual-report readiness indicator + entitlement consumption.
Materialised annual tax summary. Fed by GET /reports/annual endpoint. Long TTL because tax_calculations are immutable — the underlying data cannot change.
invalidatedBy: manual: tax:regenerate-annual-report (rare — used only after a bulk correction)

keys.description: Parsed league/iso3166 country + subdivision reference. Loaded once at boot; used by the valid_country_code + valid_state_code validators.
